Pebble watchface applications for step tracking, low-power mode, and TicToc app with JavaScript support.

## Folders
- **[kickstart](kickstart/README.md)**: Pebble watchface application for tracking step count, heart rate, and time with related data structures.
- **[low_power](low_power/README.md)**: Low-power watch face implementation and header for time and battery status on Pebble devices.
- **[tictoc](tictoc/README.md)**: Implements TicToc watch app with main function, metadata, graphical rendering, and JavaScript support.
